creator: palimpsest-dialogue/0.1
value: Do not you want to know who has taken it?
speaker: his

creator: palimpsest-dialogue/0.1
value: _You_ want to tell me, and I have no objection to hearing it.
speaker: his

creator: palimpsest-dialogue/0.1
value: How so? how can it affect them?
speaker: his

creator: palimpsest-dialogue/0.1
value: Is that his design in settling here?

creator: palimpsest-dialogue/0.1
value: In such cases, a woman has not often much beauty to think of.

creator: palimpsest-dialogue/0.1
value: It is more than I engage for, I assure you.

creator: palimpsest-dialogue/0.1
value: They have none of them much to recommend them,

creator: palimpsest-dialogue/0.1
value: Ah, you do not know what I suffer.
